response.original_title: Art Teacher Gives up Her Inhibitions to The Photographer
response.overview: One might think the schools art teacher would be the most free spirited member of the faculty however Miss Starr is anything but. She is very unfriendly to Mr. Masters when it is time for him to take the year book photos and remains very uptight when he tries to get her to show her fun side. Mr. Masters decides to use the camera’s flash for some of the photos thinking it will get Miss Starr more in the spirit and it works. Miss Starr lets herself become more relaxed and uninhibited making the decision to show a different side of herself. She does start to get angry when Mr. Masters tells her there was an issue with the camera and he needs to come back tomorrow but a quick flash pic reminds her that she was having fun and it isn’t a big deal.
response.title: Art Teacher Gives up Her Inhibitions to The Photographer
